top_themes.summary: Users have mixed opinions about the withdrawal process and fees associated with it.
sample_quotes: Limit [REFERENCE_ID] is not proper. Not able to sell all quantity at a time at a predefined price, it sells quantity partially & brokerage charges exceed more than profit. This is the worst experience.

I chose Groww expecting transparent pricing, but my experience was the opposite. The final charges were much higher than anticipated, and I did not clearly understand the full cost before executing the trade. Platforms handling financial transactions should make all fees prominen
all ok but, withdrawal was not coming in time
